backstory.original: Rust on the Harbour is a former pirate who gave up a life at sea because it was far too wet. Now trying life as an adventurer on land, he'll lend his roguish skills to anyone who can give him that which his heart desires most: one gold piece.
backstory.display: 港口的拉斯特以前是一名海盗，却因为讨厌过度潮湿而放弃了海上生涯。他现在试图在陆地上当一名冒险者来讨生活，因此愿意向一切能给予他心之所向（一枚金币）的人提供帮助，奉献他的游荡者技能。

description.original: Rust shoots a random enemy with his pistols.
description.display: 拉斯特用手枪射击一名随机敌人。

longDescription.original: Rust shoots a random enemy with his pistols.
longDescription.display: 拉斯特用手枪射击一名随机敌人。

description.original: Rust climbs into a cannon and fires himself at the enemies, dealing damage in a large area.
description.display: 拉斯特爬进一门大炮，瞄准敌人将自己发射出去，在大范围内造成伤害。

longDescription.original: Rust loads himself into a cannon and fires himself toward the enemies, dealing damage in a large area upon landing. If Rust has a shiny gold piece, he drops it while flying through the air.
longDescription.display: 拉斯特将自己装进一门大炮，瞄准敌人将自己发射出去，落地时在大范围内造成伤害。如果拉斯特有一枚闪亮金币，他在空中飞行时会把它弄掉。

description.original: Rust increases the party's gold find, this is greatly increased when he is holding his One Gold Piece
description.display: 拉斯特提高队伍的金币获取量，当他持有“一枚金币”时，此效果大幅提升

description.original: Rust increases the damage of all champions, this is increased base on the order of magnitude of the party's gold find.
description.display: 拉斯特提高所有勇士的伤害，此效果会根据队伍的金币获取量数量级而获得提升。

description.desc: Rust increases the damage of all Champions by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Champion in the formation with the Gold Find role or the Oxventurers Guild affiliation, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中每有一位金币寻获角色或“公牛冒险公会”从属组织的勇士，拉斯特会使所有勇士的伤害增加 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。

tipText.original: Rust increases the damage of all Champions, and those benefits increase for each Gold Find Champion or Oxventurers Guild affiliation member in the formation.
tipText.display: 拉斯特会提升所有勇士的伤害，并且阵型中每有一位金币寻获勇士或“公牛冒险公会”从属组织成员，加成效果会进一步增加。

description.desc: Rust increases your gold find by $(amount)%.
拉斯特会使你的金币寻获量提高 $(amount)%

Assuming Rust does not already have one, he has a $(amount___2)% chance to find a shiny gold piece after any kill that drops gold. Each time Rust finds a shiny gold piece he gains a Riches stack. Rust increases the effect of Hello, Friends by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Riches stack he has, stacking multiplicatively. Rust loses his shiny gold piece whenever you use his ultimate ability. Riches stacks are capped at the highest area unlocked divided by 5, rounded up.

假如拉斯特目前没有闪亮金币，那他有 $(amount___2)% 的几率在击杀任意会掉落金币的敌人后获得一枚闪亮金币。每次拉斯特找到一枚闪亮金币，他会获得一层“财富”堆叠。拉斯特拥有的每层“财富”堆叠会使“你们好啊，朋友们”的效果提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。每当你使用拉斯特的杀招技能，他都会丢失他的闪亮金币。“财富”的堆叠上限为已解锁的最高区域除以 5（向上取整）。

tipText.original: Rust has a chance of finding his One Gold Piece whenever an enemy is defeated which increases his damage buff. By using his ultimate, he'll drop his gold piece and give you another chance to increase his buff even further!
tipText.display: 每当有敌人被击败时，拉斯特都有机会找到他的一枚金币，它会提高他的伤害增益。使用他的杀招会使他弄丢他的金币，你便又有机会进一步提高他的增益！

description.desc: Rust increases the damage of all Champions by $(not_buffed amount)% for each order of magnitude of your Gold Find percentage, stacking multiplicatively.
你的金币获取量百分比每提高一个数量级，拉斯特会使所有勇士的伤害提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。
When Rust uses his ultimate, all other Champions with the Gold Find role or Oxventurers Guild affiliation have their remaining ultimate cooldowns reduced by $amount%.
当拉斯特使用他的杀招时，所有其他金币寻获角色或“公牛冒险公会”从属组织的勇士剩余杀招冷却时间减少 $amount%。

specializationDescription.original: Rust's flamboyant nature inspires his friends to also attempt fantastic feats of daring-do.
specializationDescription.display: 拉斯特爱炫耀的个性激发了他的朋友也去尝试一些大胆的壮举。

description.desc: Rust increases the cap of One Gold Piece's Riches stacks by $(amount)% for each Champion in the formation with the Gold Find role or Oxventurers Guild affiliation, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中每有一位金币寻获角色或“公牛冒险公会”从属组织的勇士，拉斯特会令“一枚金币的财富”堆叠层数上限提高 $(amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。

properties.spec_option_post_apply_info: 阵型中的目标勇士数量：$num_stacks

specializationDescription.original: Rust becomes more obsessed with his one gold piece, increasing the benefits he grants when he gains and loses it.
specializationDescription.display: 拉斯特变得更加痴迷他的一枚金币，这提高了他得到和失去它时提供的增益效果。

description.desc: Whenever Rust uses his ultimate ability, the weather changes to "raining gold", causing gold coins to rain from the sky. You gain gold equal to $amount% of a monster kill (including your gold find modifier) in the current area every second.
每当拉斯特使用他的杀招技能，天气会转变为“下金币雨”，会有金币从天而降。每秒钟，你获得相当于在当前区域击杀一个怪物所获金币（包括你的金币寻获量提升）$amount%的金币。

specializationDescription.original: Rust's fixation on gold becomes real when it literally starts raining gold each time he is fired out of a cannon.
specializationDescription.display: 拉斯特对金币的痴迷变成了现实，每次他被装进大炮发射出去时，都会真的下起金币雨。

description.desc: Whenever Rust is holding a shiny gold piece, he increases the effect of Hello, Friends by $amount%. Whenever Rust is NOT holding a shiny gold piece, he increases the effect of Rust For Hire by $amount%.
每当拉斯特手持闪亮金币时，他会令“你们好啊，朋友们”的效果提高 $amount%。每当拉斯特没有闪亮金币时，他会令“雇佣兵拉斯特”的效果提高 $amount%。

description.original: If we fling ourselves at the enemy, what can they do?
description.display: 如果我们扑向敌人，他们还能怎么办？

description.original: This seems like a good idea!
description.display: 这似乎是个好主意！

description.original: The more the merrier!
description.display: 越多越好！

description.original: You seem like cool people, yes?
description.display: 你们似乎是很酷的人，对吧？

description.original: I mean, they hired me to do a job. It can't be bad!
description.display: 我是说，他们雇我来完成任务。能有什么坏事呢！

description.original: I like this plan! I like that ship! I like your boots!
description.display: 我喜欢这个计划！我喜欢那艘船！我喜欢你的靴子！

description.original: Look at all this! This has to be at least one gold piece!
description.display: 快看看这些！这至少是一枚金币！

description.original: I will help anyone for...one gold piece!
description.display: 我愿意帮助任何人，只要有......一枚金币！

description.original: Look at this guy! Flashing one gold piece around!
description.display: 瞧瞧这家伙！四处炫耀一枚金币！

description.original: I will help you...for one gold piece.
description.display: 我会帮助你们......只要有一枚金币。

description.original: What is all this?
description.display: 这是什么回事？

description.original: Oh, hello friends!
description.display: 噢，你们好啊，朋友们！

description.original: Why would I need more than this? I can't even imagine that!
description.display: 我还要比这更多的东西干啥？我难以想象！

description.original: First I had nothing and now I have all I need!
description.display: 刚开始我一无所有，而现在我拥有了我需要的一切！

description.original: What do you mean more than one? Why would you need more than that?!
description.display: 你说比一多是什么意思？你要比那还多的干啥？！

description.original: One coin... Tw... Oh, come on, I know this! Give me a moment...
description.display: 一枚硬币……两……噢，真是的，我知道这个的！给我点时间……

character_sheet_details.backstory: Rust on the Harbour is a former pirate who gave up a life at sea because it was far too wet. Now trying life as an adventurer on land, he'll lend his roguish skills to anyone who can give him that which his heart desires most: one gold piece.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Rust is a Support and Gold Find Champion who draws power from a single gold coin

event_upgrades.name: Rust For Hire
event_upgrades.description: Rust increases the party's gold find, this is greatly increased when he is holding his One Gold Piece

event_upgrades.name: Highest Bidder
event_upgrades.description: Rust increases the damage of all champions, this is increased base on the order of magnitude of the party's gold find.

character_sheet_details.system_description: 拉斯特是一位支援/金币寻获勇士，他能从一枚金币中汲取力量

event_upgrades.name: 雇佣兵拉斯特

display.name: 不为人知的财富

original.name: Tiens!

display.name: 哇！

original.name: All I Need

display.name: 我需要的一切

display.name: 零到一

original.name: One is the Greatest Number

display.name: 一是最大的数字
display.description: 你说比一多是什么意思？你要比那还多的干啥？！

original.name: Scholar
original.description: One coin... Tw... Oh, come on, I know this! Give me a moment...

display.name: 学者
display.description: 一枚硬币……两……噢，真是的，我知道这个的！给我点时间……
